query:
SELECT s.id, s.serviceIdentifier, s.description, s.monthlyCost, s.providerName, s.dataSource,
       c.id as customerId, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON s.customerId = c.id
WHERE s.providerName = 'Channel Haus'
  AND s.isUnbillable = 0
ORDER BY c.name, s.serviceIdentifier;
